executives.name: Lawrie Conway
executives.background: Mr. Conway was appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director on 1 January 2023. He was previously Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer since 2014. He has more than 30 years’ experience in the resources sector across a diverse range of commercial, financial and operational activities.

tenure_dates.title: Non-Executive Director and Chair of the Audit Committee

executives.name: Susie Corlett
executives.background: Susie Corlett was appointed to the Board in June 2020. She is a geologist with over 25 years’ experience in exploration, mining operations and investment banking.
